race.comment: Tricky and the betting will be instructive with promising debutants engaged. WEASEL SEA (6) has filled a minor placing at both runs to date, the latest when beaten a long neck into second over 1000m at Yarra Valley. Has a high cruising speed and is ready to win. GIDDY GIRL (10) resumes and launched her last preparation beaten a whisker from the speed at Moe. Has jumped out well leading into this and will use the inside barrier. In a top barn and has plenty of scope for improvement. KUNG FU KID (2) debuts for a top metro stable and placed in a recent Cranbourne jumpout. Stackhouse rides and the betting will be key. ALCARAZ (1) has also jumped out well for his debut. He also profiles well and jumps from the inside barrier. BEE ADMIRED (7) is an improver from the Littlefield yard and keep onside.
